message:
Command `
# EXCELLENT! Step 73 (FillInsertion) was created and ran successfully!
# "Placed 1,734,884 filler instances" - fill insertion complete!
# 
# The flow is CONTINUING past DRT!
# Let's monitor for completion.

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 30
    PROCS=$(ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane|magic|netgen|klayout)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11}' | head -3)
    FILL_LOG=$(wc -c < /tmp/librelane_fill.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATEST_MSG=$(tail -5 /tmp/librelane_fill.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-120)
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] LOG=${FILL_LOG}B FINAL=$FINAL STEP=$STEP PROCS=[$PROCS] | $LATEST_MSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
    
    # Check if all processes died
    [ -z "$(ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane)" | grep -v grep)" ] && echo "All processes done!" && break
done
` executed with exit code -1.

function.name: execute_bash
